splitDefinition.method: Stable Fisher-Yates shuffle over scenario indices using Mulberry32 seed 0xc0def00d.

evaluationDesign.causalHistory: referencePoll rows with elapsedMicroseconds <= anchor elapsedMicroseconds
evaluationDesign.label: interpolated referencePoll at anchor + horizon

baselineList.description: Hold the most recent causal referencePoll position.
Constant velocity from the last two referencePoll observations, uncapped.
Constant velocity from the last two referencePoll observations, capped to 64 px displacement.
Linear least-squares velocity over the last 3 referencePoll samples.
Linear least-squares velocity over the last 5 referencePoll samples.
Linear least-squares velocity over the last 8 referencePoll samples.
Linear least-squares velocity over the last 12 referencePoll samples.
Velocity and acceleration from the last three causal referencePoll samples.
Light alpha-beta tracker over the last 12 referencePoll samples.
Causal speed gate: constant position below 25 px/s, LS n8 otherwise.
Offline oracle gate: hold uses constant position, resume uses last2 cap64, moving uses LS n8.

bestModelPerSegment.rankingMetric: lowest p95 error, then lowest mean error

step3: Use deterministic baseline residuals as labels/features.
Start with compact product-eligible gates before any heavier model.
Report normal and stress separately for validation and test.
